name: Exotic Nutrition Critter Selects Hedgie Bugs & Veggies Hedgehog Treats, 2.75-oz bag
description: Feed your hedgie’s love of veggies with Exotic Nutrition Critter Selects Hedgie Bugs & Veggies Hedgehog Treats. These dehydrated treats are formulated using a blend of your little buddy’s favorite foods. They feature a nutritious mix of dried mealworms, dried crickets, peas, carrots and apples that can be sprinkled on food or placed in a foraging toy for increased exercise and stimulation. These veggie treats are packaged in the USA and designed to help keep your companion’s daily diet from becoming monotonous.
